title: Iteration 1 — Phase 0 + initial Phase 1-6 scaffolding
summary: Monorepo (pnpm workspaces, apps/web + apps/ops + packages/{agents,db,inngest,shared}); 9 agents (Roast, Rewrite, BrandVoice, Onboarder, SendInfra warmup + personaliser, PerformanceMonitor, Outbound, Support); Anthropic client with prompt caching; Inngest durable functions with operator approval gate; Stripe webhook + checkout route; Roast page + API + OG image; onboarding wizard; customer + operator dashboards; legal pages; CI workflow; 26 passing tests.

title: Monorepo scaffold, deploy preview pipeline, env management, secrets vault
summary: Root package.json + pnpm-workspace.yaml + tsconfig.base.json + apps/web + apps/ops + packages/{agents,db,inngest,shared} + .env.example covering Anthropic/Stripe/Supabase/Inngest/Smartlead/Postmark/Apollo/Sentry/PostHog + zod-validated env loader + GitHub Actions CI.

title: Supabase project + schema migrations
summary: packages/db/migrations/0001_init.sql covering all PRD §5.3 tables: customers, sequences, campaigns, send_batches, prospects, performance_snapshots, approvals_queue, events, roasts, leads. Includes enums, indexes, updated_at trigger, RLS baselines.

title: Inngest project, basic functions wired
summary: packages/inngest with typed event registry + 4 durable functions (onboardingPipeline with operator approval gate via step.waitForEvent, roastSubmitted, checkoutCompleted, performanceDailyPull cron). Served from apps/web/api/inngest route.

title: Stripe test mode + webhook handler stub
summary: apps/web/api/stripe/webhook (verifies signature, upserts customer, dispatches Inngest event) + apps/web/api/checkout (creates session). API version pinned to 2025-02-24.acacia.

title: Anthropic SDK client with prompt caching enabled
summary: packages/agents/src/client.ts: anthropic() singleton, modelFor(tier) (planning/development/fast → Opus/Sonnet/Haiku), cachedSystemBlock() helper applying cache_control: ephemeral, callJsonAgent() helper, tolerant JSON extractor.

title: Sentry + PostHog wired
summary: packages/shared/src/observability.ts: captureException, addBreadcrumb, serverPosthog (lazy), captureServerEvent + track helpers. Funnel events typed: visited_landing, started_roast, submitted_email, viewed_result, clicked_upsell, started_checkout, completed_checkout, etc.
